svg.title: TIG Rotator UI screen map
svg.desc: Overview of the 21 active LVGL screens used by the ESP32-P4 TIG rotator firmware.
svg.text: ESP32-P4 | LVGL 9.5 | 800x480 landscape | 21 active ScreenId roots | Dark industrial theme

g.text: Main screen RPM is pot-driven only; touchscreen +/- RPM controls live on jog, pulse, step, timer and program edit screens.
START, STOP, JOG, PULSE, STEP and TIMER requests route through controlTask mailbox before motor functions run on Core 0.
Timer stores countdown on start/back, then switches to main after countdown and continuous start request.
Motor config save is blocked unless state is IDLE, then settings are applied by motorTask.
Generated from current src/ui/screen structure; dimensions retain 800x480 landscape proportions.
